title: Google Cloud DNS Managed Zone
description: Represents a Cloud DNS managed zone resource, including its DNS name, name servers, visibility, DNSSEC configuration, and associated metadata.

dnsName.description: The DNS name of this managed zone, for instance example.com.

description.description: A mutable string of at most 1024 characters associated with this resource.

nameServers.description: Delegate your managed zone to these virtual name servers.

visibility.description: The zone's visibility: public or private.

dnssecConfig.description: DNSSEC configuration for this managed zone.

creationTime.description: The time that this resource was created on the server.
